list.title: Doctors
list.resultsDescription: Browse the doctors available in the hospital.

details.title: Doctor details
details.description: Review linked account, specialization, and department details.
details.notFoundDescription: This doctor is unavailable, disabled, or no longer exists.

form.formDescription: Fill in the doctor details below.
form.userReadOnlyHint: The linked user account is read only here.

states.loadingOptionsDescription: Please wait while users and departments are loaded.
states.emptyDescription: Create a doctor to get started.
states.emptyDepartmentsDescription: Create a department before adding doctors.
states.emptyUsersDescription: Create a user account before linking it to a doctor.
states.unauthorizedDescription: Your session is not authorized for this request.
states.forbiddenDescription: You do not have permission to access this resource.
states.createForbiddenDescription: Only admins can create doctor records.
states.errorDescription: We could not load doctor data.

errors.list: We could not load the doctors list.
errors.details: We could not load this doctor.
errors.save: We could not save the doctor.
errors.delete: We could not delete the doctor.
errors.statusUpdate: We could not update the doctor's status.
errors.departments: We could not load the departments for this form.
errors.users: We could not load the users for this form.

modals.disableDescription: Existing appointment and medical record history will be preserved, but this doctor will no longer be available for new appointments or medical records.

validation.phoneNumber: Use a valid phone number like +38344111222.
